name: Pizza Master VR - Pizza Cooking Game

reviews.review_description: Terrible game play don't think u can return

reviews.review_title: Game does not work! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.review_description: The game does not work! And will not allow you to request a refund. I will be calling customer support first thing tomorrow to report and have the game removed!

reviews.review_title: Not worth the bundle at all
reviews.review_description: Poor quality, needs alot of improvement

I purchased this early access combo excited to try because I absolutely love cooking simulators, not all but most. I was  really excited about these two games because they are right up my alley, as far as the types I like. Well I got on the shop master and couldn't do anything, but move around. Got on the pizza master and couldn't control hands very well or items on the page. Could not pick up cheese etc. So I was very disappointed. I know it's still in the development stage, but I thought I would be able to do a little more than I was able to which was really nothing. Hoping to get updated on the development progress.
